items.title: Boeing Co (BA) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Highlights: Record Revenue and Strong Order Backlog Amid ...
items.description: Boeing Co (BA) reports its highest quarterly revenue since 2018 and a record-setting backlog, while navigating operational hurdles and cash flow challenges.

items.title: Earnings live: UnitedHealth stock falls 19%, American Airlines slides, Texas Instruments pops, Logitech edges higher
items.description: The fourth quarter earnings season kicks into high gear this week, with Big Tech results from Microsoft, Meta, Tesla, and Apple headlining the earnings calendar.

items.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Loses 400 Points As UnitedHealth Tumbles; S&P 500 Sets A Record (Live Coverage)
items.description: Stock Market Today: The S&P 500 closed at a new level while small caps lagged. Reddit was a big loser.

items.title: Boeing's Q4 Loss Wider Than Estimates, Revenues Increase Y/Y
items.description: BA's Q4 reports a loss of $1.91 per share, revenues surge 57% and deliveries jump, helping cap a sharp full-year turnaround.

items.title: Boeing wants to deliver 500 737 jets in 2026 as production ramps up
items.description: Investing.com -- Boeing plans to deliver 500 of its 737 family jets in 2026 as it increases production, no longer relying on its stockpile of previously built MAX planes.
